tasks.prompt: CSV order imports break on real export rows with quoted fields and thousands separators. Fix order_totals so it keeps returning cents per order.
Docs sidebar links point to wrong anchors when a page has duplicate headings and fenced code examples. Fix heading_anchors.
Billing permissions are too loose: admins can delete invoices, and action aliases are inconsistent. Fix has_permission so deny rules win and aliases/wildcards behave.
Percentage feature-flag rollouts are unstable and missing flags can crash. Fix is_enabled without changing the public API.
Account balances double count retried ledger events and sometimes include voided entries. Fix balance_for_account.
Environment overrides are corrupting runtime config: blank values should be ignored, booleans/lists should keep their intended types, and unknown keys should not be added. Fix resolve_config.
API response decoding is hiding bad upstream responses. Fix parse_response so invalid JSON raises ResponseDecodeError, id/status/items are required, and items must be a list.
Payment state transitions currently allow impossible states. Fix apply_event so illegal transitions raise InvalidTransition and valid transitions still work.
